citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
The Landlord acknowledges the Tenant has paid the Advance Payment of FIVE HUNDRED POUNDS (£500) STERLING which will be credited to the Tenant's rent account.

findings.text: The tenancy agreement states a total rent of £4,686.18 for the period 13 March 2026 to 25 August 2026, including a £500 advance payment.
The agreement states that a separate rent schedule showing monthly instalments will be provided to the tenant.
The landlord acknowledges receipt of a £500 advance rent payment credited to the tenant's rent account.
No rent schedule or payment records are contained within source NAP-SRC-0010; the agreement refers to a separate document.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Rent Schedule and Payment Records Search

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence Agreement for Miss Anfal Elbushra)

**Finding:** The tenancy agreement confirms a total rent of £4,686.18 for the period 13 March 2026 to 25 August 2026, with a £500 advance payment acknowledged. However, the agreement explicitly states that the monthly instalment schedule will be provided separately (Clause 2(a)). No rent schedule or payment records were found within this source.

**Next Step:** Search other matter sources (e.g., correspondence, financial records, accommodation office communications) for the separate rent schedule and any payment/arrears ledgers.
proposed_artifacts.title: Rent Schedule and Payment Records Search Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search all other matter sources (e.g., correspondence, financial records, accommodation office communications) for the separate rent schedule referenced in NAP-SRC-0010 Clause 2(a), and for any payment records, receipts, account statements, or arrears ledgers related to Miss Anfal Elbushra's tenancy at Castlelaw House.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for rent schedule and payment records in correspondence and financial sources

risk_flags.text: The rent schedule referenced in the agreement is missing from the source materials; this is critical for determining arrears.
Without payment records, the current arrears balance cannot be verified from this source alone.

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence) for rent schedule and payment records. The agreement states a total rent of £4,686.18, an advance payment of £500, and that a rent schedule will be provided separately. No rent schedule or payment records were found within this source. The source is a tenancy agreement only, not a payment ledger. A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources for the separate rent schedule and payment records.

uncertainties.text: The actual rent schedule showing monthly instalment amounts and due dates is not present in source NAP-SRC-0010.
No payment records (e.g., receipts, account statements, arrears ledger) are available in the provided source materials.
It is unknown whether the tenant made any additional rent payments beyond the £500 advance payment.
